name: 积分入门
subject: math
curriculum_points: Integrate functions of the form f(x) = ax^n, e^x, sin x, and cos x, and apply the fundamental theorem of calculus (AO1).
Use definite integration to calculate areas under curves and between curves, interpreting the result in an applied context.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「积分入门」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Integrate functions of the form f(x) = ax^n, e^x, sin x, and cos x, and apply the fundamental theorem of calculus (AO1).…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Use definite integration to calculate areas under curves and between curves, int… 对理解「积分入门」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
